name: @tank/vector-graphics-gen
description:
Generate vector graphics (SVG) using AI APIs. fal.ai with Recraft V3/V4 for native SVG, image-to-SVG conversion, prompt engineering, SVGO optimization, and web integration (React, Vue, sprites, dark mode).

Trigger phrases: "generate SVG", "SVG icon", "vector illustration", "fal.ai", "recraft", "text to SVG", "image to SVG", "vectorize", "vector logo", "icon generation", "SVG for web", "fal-ai/recraft", "vector pattern", "production SVG", "text-to-vector"
